'''Zap'Ulga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] under [[Sebolto]]'s employ and was also involved with pirate activity and [[Nexu/Legends|Nexu]] poaching. He was wanted by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Ask Aak/Legends|Ask Aak]] for connections to a series of raids on [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] carrying relief supplies to [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].

The bounty, which was worth 4,000 credits alive and 2,000 credits dead was later claimed by the notorious bounty hunter [[Jango Fett]] during his attempt to get to Sebolto.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
